name: 城市系统
subject: inquiry
domain_name: 组织与结构 / Organizations & Systems / Organizations
curriculum_points: Students will be able to investigate the key systems of an urban area (e.g., transportation, housing, waste management) and explain how they are interconnected. (Age 7-9)
Students will be able to design a model or plan for a sustainable city, considering the balance between human needs and environmental impact. (Age 9-11)

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 探究式学习动画：问题→假设→实验→结论流程可视化
interactive_resources.description: Canvas/JS 探究学习过程可视化
